creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
After the update from 2.7.0 -> 2.7.1_2, icinga2 failed to start on a satellite due to feature perfdata enabled. perfdata wasn't properly configured nor needed. So, a portion of the problem was a kind of "selfmade".

Another problem still remains concerning the missing folders/files which should be checked by the rc script when starting icinga2.
